qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Zip member traversal in safe_extract writes outside the intended extraction root
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the same guarddog/utils/archives.py safe_extract() call to zip.extract(file, path=os.path.join(target_directory, file)) and the same zip path-sanitization bypass described by the advisory.

selected_finding.title: Zip member traversal in safe_extract writes outside the intended extraction root

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The finding matches the advisory's exact vulnerable function and root cause, and the copied PoC reproduced an attacker-controlled write outside the intended extraction root on the pinned vulnerable GuardDog commit.
evidence: The advisory and the finding both identify guarddog/utils/archives.py safe_extract() and the vulnerable zip.extract(file, path=os.path.join(target_directory, file)) call that reuses the attacker-controlled member name in the extraction path.

The copied PoC log at /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_835753cc/.judge/poc_runs/safe_extract_zip_traversal/run.log shows the vulnerable commit 5ca1d2e930c4f2c423c94306e2cfba28b6066c02 was checked out before execution.

That same log shows escaped_exists=True, escaped_within_extract_root=False, escaped_content=EVOHUNT_ZIP_TRAVERSAL_PROOF, and VERIFICATION_PASSED, confirming attacker-controlled file creation outside the intended extraction root.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The adapted copied PoC cloned the pinned vulnerable GuardDog commit, processed a crafted zip member with ../ traversal, and produced escaped_exists=True, escaped_within_extract_root=False, escaped_content=EVOHUNT_ZIP_TRAVERSAL_PROOF, and VERIFICATION_PASSED in run.log.
